zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Alesia di Saluzzo於1269年5月18日出生在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左時，她的父親Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo29歲，母親Luigia Di Ceva29歲。她於1283年與Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel在英國素可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年9月25日在英國素可阿盧德爾享年23歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾豪頓 德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Alesia di Saluzzo于1269年5月18日出生在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左时，她的父亲Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo29岁，母亲Luigia Di Ceva29岁。她于1283年与Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel在英国素可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年9月25日在英国素可阿盧德爾享年23岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾豪頓 德斯。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Alesia di Saluzzo was born on 18 May 1269, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo, was 29 and her mother, Luigia Di Ceva, was 29. She married Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel in 1283, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 September 1292, in Arundel, Sussex, England, at the age of 23, and was buried in Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Alesia di Saluzzo est née le 18 mai 1269, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Luigia Di Ceva, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel en 1283, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 septembre 1292, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Haughmond Abbey, Shropshire, England: Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Alesia di Saluzzo am 18. Mai 1269 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo 29 und ihre Mutter Luigia Di Ceva 29. Sie hat 1283 in Sussex, England Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. September 1292 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Arundel, Sussex, England und wurde in Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Alesia di Saluzzo è nata il il 18 maggio 1269 nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Luigia Di Ceva, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel nel 1283, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 settembre 1292, nel Arundel, Sussex, England, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolta a Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Alesia di Saluzzoが1269年5月18日にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで生まれた時，父Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzoは29歳，母Luigia Di Cevaは29歳であった。1283年にイギリススセックスでRichard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年9月25日にイギリススセックスアルンデルで23歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアハウトン デメスンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Alesia di Saluzzo(이)가 1269년 5월 18일 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Luigia Di Ceva(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1283년 영국 수세스에서 Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 9월 25일 영국 수세스 아런들에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 하우그h턴 데메스니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Alesia di Saluzzo nasceu em 18 de maio de 1269, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Luigia Di Ceva, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel em 1283, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1292, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 23 anos, e foi sepultada em Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Alesia di Saluzzo родилась 18 мая 1269 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Luigia Di Ceva, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel в 1283 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 сентября 1292 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности хотон демесн, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Alesia di Saluzzo nació el 18 de mayo de 1269, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Luigia Di Ceva, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel en 1283, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1292, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultada en Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
